subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O My handmaiden, inasmuch as thy letter hath been honored in attaining the presence of this Prisoner in this Most Manifest Prison, and hath descended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا امتی بما تشرف کتابک اذ فاز بمنظر المسجون فیهذا السجن المبین و نزل
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
